title: Support slices of queues
body:
Medium starter task.

This [sv-tests](https://github.com/SymbiFlow/sv-tests) fail:

* tests/chapter-7/queues/slice.sv

As the queue sliced syntax is not yet supported.

1. Add test_regress/t/t_queue tests for the slice syntax.

2. Improve V3Width and related code to support to allow forming a new (temporary) queue as the output of slicing a queue.  Note $ is represented by AstUnbounded.
